name: 山田的手机
shooting_angle: 正面、背面、侧面、手持近耳视角
reference_prompt: A silver-colored smartphone, approximately 15cm x 7cm x 0.8cm, made of metal and glass, standard rectangular smartphone structure with no visible text on screen, clean and new condition, shown from front, back, and side angles, high-resolution product photography style.。源记录硬约束：数量:1；位置:手持从口袋取出；运动政策:手持拨号，轻微移动到耳边

source_contract.motion_policy: 手持拨号，轻微移动到耳边
